title: Steven Keener

published_titles: Director of the Center for Crime, Equity and Justice Research and Policy
biography: Dr. Steven Keener earned his Ph.D. in Public Policy and Administration from Virginia Commonwealth University, where he specialized in Criminology and Criminal Justice Policy. He earned a M.S. in Criminal Justice from VCU and a B.A. in Political Science with a minor in Philosophy and Religious Studies from Christopher Newport University. Dr. Keener primarily teaches Crime in America, Incarceration and Punishment, and Mental Health and the Criminal Justice System. His primary research interests include the intersection of mental health and the criminal justice system, the ramifications of incarceration, and criminal justice policy. Dr. Keener is the Director of the Center for Crime, Equity, and Justice Research and Policy at CNU.
